html:
Exclusive to:

“Even the heart of stone can be cracked by a little warmth... or perhaps a lot.”

-

The Geode Fruits can be harvested from Sproutrock trees. After picking from a tree they will regrow after 12 to 25 days. The Geode Fruits can be placed near a heat sources to heat up. After heating to 60 degrees for 30 seconds, they will break and drop one random Gem (except Iridescent Gem) for each fruit.

ResourcesFood

"ancientfruit_gem"
“Hot and fresh off the tree.”
–Wilson
“It's so pretty, let's toss it in the fire!”
–Willow
“Even Wolfgang's mighty jaw can't bite into funny rock-fruit.”
–Wolfgang
“A fruit that offers no sweetness.”
–Wendy
“IT IS HARD TO CLASSIFY AS ORGANIC OR INORGANIC... HOW DISTURBING”
–WX-78
“I suspect burning away the tough outer skin might reveal something at its core.”
–Wickerbottom
“Maybe roasting it will soften it up, eh?”
–Woodie
“I sense magic at its core. Now, how to get it out...”
–Maxwell
“I care nöt för any fruit, much less öne as hard as stöne!”
–Wigfrid
“It's too hard to take a bite out of.”
–Webber
“I wonder if it's possible to cook such a stony fruit?”
–Warly
“Hmm. Something inside”
–Wormwood
“For a fruit, it's one tough nut to crack.”
–Winona
“Don't try to eat it, better to heat it!”
–Wortox
“Grrrr, too hard to eat!”
–Wurt
“Is this really a fruit? It's as hard as a rock!”
–Walter
“I'd rather not break my teeth on that, thank you.”
–Wanda
“Even the heart of stone can be cracked by a little warmth... or perhaps a lot.”
-
The Geode Fruits can be harvested from Sproutrock trees. After picking from a tree they will regrow after 12 to 25 days. The Geode Fruits can be placed near a heat sources to heat up. After heating to 60 degrees for 30 seconds, they will break and drop one random Gem (except Iridescent Gem) for each fruit.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Quả Geode có thể được thu hoạch từ cây Sproutrock. Sau khi hái từ cây, chúng sẽ mọc lại sau 12 đến 25 ngày. Quả Geode có thể được đặt gần nguồn nhiệt để làm nóng. Sau khi làm nóng đến 60 độ trong 30 giây, chúng sẽ vỡ và rơi ra một viên Ngọc ngẫu nhiên (trừ Ngọc Ánh Kim) cho mỗi quả.
